violations.text: Ceiling tiles and vents were observed with an accumulation of dust and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

Then ceiling of the walk-in cooler was observed to be leaking water/liquid into a trash barrel from a large screw/bolt in the ceiling (not dripping onto foods). Per the PIC, a work order has been placed for repair/adjustment to prevent the leak. PIC is to continue to protect the food by storage of food items away from the leak until walk-in ceiling is serviced/repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the back prep/storage area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

Roast beef was observed held at 107-111 degrees Fahrenheit in a hot holding unit and 78 degrees Fahrenheit outside of temperature control on a countertop. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The food items were either re-heated at time of inspection or voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
Ceiling tiles and vents were observed with an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the bleach/chlorine sanitizing solution. New Violation. Correct By: 06/28/2024

The presence of flying insects is not controlled. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at ALL times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment to have more employees enroll in a CFSM course. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023
The prep/slicing area is lacking a hand-washing sink. Handwash sink to be installed in area to allow for a hand sink to be easily accessible. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

The sink and surface concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was (0) parts per million (ppm). The concentration of sink and surface must follow the manufacturer's instructions. (Bottle was empty. Bottle was replaced.) Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/29/2023

The floor and ceiling vent in the back ware washing area has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2023
